title: Implement Lenskit-native agent impact context v1
goal: Implement and measure a deterministic read-only impact/edit context that adopts CodeGraph's useful relation, related-test and pre-edit context ideas using existing Lenskit artifacts and authority boundaries.

approval.note: Use an isolated branch/worktree. Before merge require a complete downloadable diff, head- and diff-bound self-review, green CI and exact post-merge validation.

acceptance.assertion: An explicit path or symbol produces a deterministic bounded context containing the target, incoming and outgoing relations, related tests, contracts/docs/entrypoints, source statuses and gaps.
Graph-derived, symbol-derived and heuristic candidates remain distinguishable with provenance, direction and evidence level; stale or missing inputs cannot appear current.
RepoBrief remains read-only: no Git, patch, shell, test, PR, memory or source-tree mutation and no review verdict, risk score, coverage guarantee or merge authorization.

A fixed goldset compares the candidate with the existing read-only workbench and records target recall, context size, missing-evidence visibility and non-regression without claiming general repository understanding.
The feature reuses existing Lenskit graph, symbol, query, relation-card and Delta Context components rather than creating a second index authority or CodeGraph service.
Tests, CI, complete diff, diff-bound self-review, mergeability and post-merge validation pass before verification.

metadata.source_request: alles umsetzen (vorher natürlich im bureau registrieren)
